title: adiantum hispidulum var. normale
intro: Adiantum hispidulum var. normale, also known as the hairy maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adiantum hispidulum var. normale include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
